limitations: Direct support exists, but reliable stronger evidence materially conflicts with the claim.
passes.name: Primary support plus stronger contradiction

limitations: Equal-tier authoritative evidence conflicts on the procedural status.
passes.name: Official order support plus equal authoritative contradiction

limitations: Missing referenced primary source cannot verify the claim.
passes.name: Attorney email references missing docket
passes.transition_reason: Missing source block outranks tier-2 contextual support.

limitations: Court order may support a document fact, but the legal conclusion is only indirectly supported and OCR-caveated.
passes.name: OCR-damaged court order plus legal inference
passes.transition_reason: Legal conclusion block prevents inherited verification from damaged document.

limitations: Manual override cannot mark VERIFIED without reliable direct evidence.
passes.name: Manual override attempts VERIFIED without direct evidence
passes.transition_reason: Manual override is rejected; user statement remains user-originated.

limitations: External material weakly corroborates plausibility but does not directly verify the exact claim.
passes.name: User statement with weak corroboration upgrades only to INFERRED
passes.transition_reason: User-originated claim with indirect corroboration upgrades only to INFERRED.

passes.name: Mixed evidence tiers choose strongest direct official source
passes.transition_reason: Strongest direct official source satisfies verification standard.

limitations: Real filing establishes existence of filing only, not motive or intent.
passes.name: Motive inference attached to real filing
passes.transition_reason: Motive claim cannot inherit verification from real filing.

limitations: Claim is substantively a legal conclusion despite procedural phrasing.
passes.name: Legal conclusion phrased as procedural fact
passes.transition_reason: Legal-substance detector blocks verification when legal conclusion is asserted as fact.

limitations: Tier-2 event exception does not extend to legal sufficiency conclusions.
passes.name: Tier-2 process-server exception cannot verify legal sufficiency
passes.transition_reason: Official affidavit may support event fact only; legal sufficiency remains blocked.

passes.name: AI memory noise plus official direct source
passes.transition_reason: AI memory does not verify the claim, but official direct evidence independently does.

limitations: Primary source appears to support the claim, but provenance/OCR uncertainty bars VERIFIED.
passes.name: Primary source with provenance uncertainty capped at provisional
